title: Artemis II flight complete
description: The crewed lunar flyby flight of the Artemis programme. Launched April 1, 2026 from KSC LC-39B and splashed down April 11, 2026 after a nine-day mission around the Moon.

title: Starship V3 maiden flight
description: SpaceX's third-generation Starship design for lunar descent operations. First integrated flight planned for May 2026 to demonstrate orbital capabilities.

title: Starship orbital propellant transfer demo
description: Demonstration of orbital propellant transfer between two Starship vehicles in Earth orbit. Critical capability for lunar descent and return missions.

title: Blue Moon Mk1 Pathfinder cargo landing
description: Blue Origin's first lunar cargo lander completing a pathfinder mission. Validates cargo delivery systems and landing procedures for human lunar operations.

title: AxEMU flight unit delivery to NASA
description: Axiom Space's Extravehicular Mobility Unit spacesuit delivered for testing and integration. First modern pressure suit designed for lunar surface operations.

title: Axiom critical design sync review pass
description: Axiom's critical design review and synchronization assessment with NASA. Final gate before flight unit manufacturing and qualification testing.

title: Blue Moon Mk2 uncrewed demo
description: Blue Origin's crew-rated lunar lander performing an uncrewed demonstration mission. Validates all systems before human crew transport.

title: Starship HLS uncrewed LEO checkout
description: Integrated test of the Starship lunar variant in low Earth orbit. Validates all systems in space environment before lunar missions.

title: Artemis III crew announcement
description: Official announcement of the Artemis III crew composition. Public declaration of astronauts selected for the lunar landing mission.

title: Artemis III SLS core stage at KSC
description: Artemis III Space Launch System core stage delivered to Kennedy Space Center for assembly and integration. Major structural component of the launch vehicle.

title: Artemis III rollout to LC-39B
description: Artemis III fully-stacked launch vehicle rolled out to Launch Complex 39B at Kennedy Space Center. Final preparation phase begins.

title: Artemis III launch
description: Artemis III crewed lunar landing mission launch. Completes the return to the Moon and carries astronauts to the lunar surface.
